'''âz-t-y-j''' ('''kazatyejoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:exasperate|exasperate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-t-y-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:exasperate|exasperate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âz-t-y-j
|-
! Lemma
| kazatyejoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizatyejoko|thizatyejoko]] || [[word:jizatyejoko|jizatyejoko]] || [[word:shizatyejoko|shizatyejoko]] || [[word:kizatyejoko|kizatyejoko]]
|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
